title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
